evals.prompt: Our jeans PDP gets hammered in reviews — maybe 40% of recent ones say runs at least one size small. Conversion dipped last month. We need page-level fixes, not just reply templates.
evals.expected_output: Cluster identification, barrier table, fit module + trust badge refactor, selling-point correction.
expectations: Centers on page structure and PDP optimization, not reply-only content
Addresses concentrated complaint (runs small) as conversion barrier
Includes table mapping review theme to page-level fix and trust element
Includes selling-point or claim correction logic
Proposes trust badge or module changes tied to reviews

evals.prompt: Skincare serum: reviews cluster on 'stings' and 'fragrance too strong.' Stars still OK but PDP promises 'gentle for all skin.' What should we change on the page?
evals.expected_output: Contradiction between claims and reviews; structural copy and trust; sensitive-skin callout.
expectations: Corrects or relocates 'gentle for all' type claims
Page-level recommendations (ingredients, patch test, who should avoid)
Trust elements specific to sensitivity — not generic badges only
Minimal focus on public review reply as main output

evals.prompt: Write 5 short replies to paste under 1-star reviews saying thanks only.
evals.expected_output: Brief replies allowed; skill boundary — no full page opus required as sole output; may still note one structural tip.
expectations: May provide reply text appropriate to simple reply request
Does not replace the whole answer with only page audit if user asked only replies — replies are OK
If skill is followed strictly, at most one short optional paragraph on page fixes — primary ask is replies
